title: bromopsis ramosa subsp. benekenii
intro: Bromopsis ramosa subsp. benekenii, also known as Beneken's bent or mountain bent, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromopsis ramosa subsp. benekenii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
